description_long: This rifle features a robust, tactical design with a long, metallic barrel and a solid, angular receiver. The body is primarily constructed from dark, matte-finished metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern, military appearance. The stock is fixed and ergonomically shaped, with a thumbhole grip for improved handling and stability. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine and has a prominent rail system along the top for mounting optics or accessories. The muzzle end appears to have a flash hider or compensator, and the handguard is vented for heat dissipation. The overall build suggests a weapon designed for precision and durability in urban environments.
description: A modern, tactical rifle with a long barrel, fixed stock, and detachable box magazine, finished in dark metal and polymer. Features include a rail system, thumbhole grip, and a flash hider or compensator at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel profile and symmetrical handguard, with the muzzle device visible at the tip.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, thumbhole grip, magazine, and detailed receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock and grip, with the barrel and handguard extending away from the viewer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other side of the receiver, stock, and magazine.
